Description:
Descripción de la empresa

SGS es líder mundial en inspección, verificación, análisis y certificación. Está considerada como principal referente mundial en calidad e integridad, contamos con más de 93.000 empleados y con una red de más de 2.600 oficinas y laboratorios por todo el mundo.

Descripción del empleo

Se necesita para desempeñar funciones en laboratorio en barrio industrial de Calama a técnico nivel medio o superior en analisis quimico para cargo de Quimico B

El Cargo Implica

Ejecutar los diversos servicios de análisis de laboratorio, relacionados con la composición, propiedades y reacciones de los elementos químicos y físicos que forman las muestras. Implica Efectuar metodologías a todo nivel de complejidad y ser el responsable del cumplimiento de las políticas y normas de calidad, seguridad y medio ambiente

Las Principales Funciones Serán
Asegurar la correcta ejecución del método de análisis o determinaciones a su cargo, implica realizar cálculos de verificación, además de resguardar los resultados e insumos a su cargo y los datos a registrar en los tiempos establecidos.
Disponer, asegurar o preparar los insumos, equipos y/o complementos necesarios para la ejecución de los análisis de laboratorio, manipulando reactivos químicos y controlando su calidad antes de su uso.
Asegurar y cumplir con todas las actividades relacionada al tratamiento de las muestras, preparación de reactivos y estándares; como también la integridad de los resultados según los procedimientos vigentes.
Requisitos
Estudios Formales:
Formación Técnica nivel Medio o Superior en Química, Analista de Laboratorio, Analista Químico, Carreras afín.
Experiencia en Análisis Instrumental y Análisis Clásica de minerales.
Experiencia en Volumetria de Cobre
Área o rubro similar: 1 años en laboratorios de servicio.

Cargo similar: 1 años en laboratorio de minerales.
Competencias mínimas necesarias:
Manejo en buenas prácticas de laboratorio.

Conocimiento en Normas de Calidad.

Manejo de Técnicas o Metodologías de análisis en minerales.

Residencia en Calama

Información adicional

Title: Desarrollador senior, Trilogy (Remote) - $200,000/year USD
Location: Iquique, Tarapaca, Chile

Apts: ['ASP.NET', 'Bases de datos', 'C#', 'Desarrollo de software', 'HTML', 'Hojas de estilos en cascada (CSS)', 'Java', 'Metodologías ágiles', 'Oracle Database', 'Software comercial']
Description:
Crossover is the world's #1 source of full-time remote jobs. Our clients offer top-tier pay for top-tier talent. We're recruiting this role for our client, Trilogy. Have you got what it takes?

Looking for a next-level coding challenge? Join our team at Trilogy and help us build innovative cloud-native software solutions that delight millions of customers across multiple industries.

We're looking for the best and brightest coding talent in Latin America to join our elite team. With our lightning-fast 4-8 hour SLAs and individual code challenges, you'll have the opportunity to showcase your skills and earn a generous salary of USD 200k, with the chance to double your compensation as you move up the Engineering ladder.

And the best part? At Trilogy, we've been remote for the last fifteen years. That's right - you'll have the ultimate flexibility to work from wherever you want. We operate under a global asynchronous model, giving you the power to plan your workweek around your schedule, with 8-hour shifts for three or four days a week and never exceeding 40 hours.

Don't miss out on this exciting opportunity to take your coding career to the next level. Join our team at Trilogy and become part of a global community of top-performing developers. Apply now!

What You Will Be Doing

Designing innovative commercial software and writing high-quality code to bring them into production.
Implementing new features on existing software products by solving complex implementation problems and making the appropriate technical decisions.
Fixing bugs to permanently eliminate defects that impair product functionality.

What You Won’t Be Doing

Dealing with unclear expectations or non-technical managers. Every task will have a clear scope and objective for you to implement.
Executing repeated tasks for the same product using the same tech stack. Our portfolio of 60+ products ensures you are always tackling new challenges.
Non-technical tasks. This is a role for those who love coding and want to dedicate time to solving complex technical issues.

Desarrollador Senior Key Responsibilities

Solve the most difficult coding challenges and develop great software products that delight millions of customers.

Basic Requirements

5+ years of commercial software development experience
The ability to solve complex implementation problems and bug fixes independently with minimal guidance
Located in Latin America and available to work during US business hours

About Trilogy

Hundreds of software businesses run on the Trilogy Business Platform. For three decades, Trilogy has been known for 3 things: Relentlessly seeking top talent, Innovating new technology, and incubating new businesses. Our technological innovation is spearheaded by a passion for simple customer-facing designs. Our incubation of new businesses ranges from entirely new moon-shot ideas to rearchitecting existing projects for today's modern cloud-based stack. Trilogy is a place where you can be surrounded with great people, be proud of doing great work, and grow your career by leaps and bounds.

There is so much to cover for this exciting role, and space here is limited. Hit the Apply button if you found this interesting and want to learn more. We look forward to meeting you!

Working with Crossover

This is a full-time (40 hours per week), long-term position. The position is immediately available and requires entering into an independent contractor agreement with Crossover. The compensation level for this role is $100 USD/hour, which equates to $200,000 USD/year assuming 40 hours per week and 50 weeks per year. The payment period is weekly. Consult www.crossover.com/help-and-faqs for more details on this topic.

What to expect next:

You will receive an email with a link to start your self-paced, online job application.
Our hiring platform will guide you through a series of online “screening” assessments to check for basic job fit, job-related skills, and finally a few real-world job-specific assignments.

Important! If you do not receive an email from us:

First, emails may take up to 15 minutes to send, refresh and check again.
Second, check your spam and junk folders for an email from Crossover.com, mark as “Not Spam” since you will receive other emails as well.
Third, we will send to whatever email account you indicated on the Apply form - by default, that is the email address you use as your LinkedIn username and it might be different than the one you have already checked.
If all else fails, just reset your password by visiting https://www.crossover.com/auth/password-recovery if you already applied using LinkedIn EasyApply.
Crossover Job Code: LJ-4906-CL-IquiqueP-Desarrolladors

Description:
C/C++ R&D Engineer

The Synopsys Mask Solutions Group is looking for motivated software engineers for the CATS team. This position will give you the opportunity to develop software used by major semiconductor companies in the world. CATS is a market-leading, highly scalable and flexible software application. It transcribes complex design data into machine readable instructions for e-beam and laser machines, used for the pattern generation and manufacturing of semiconductor products. The R&D team works on a variety of problems, including high-performance 2D computational geometry, distributed computing, and efficient I/O. In this role, you will join an experienced software development team and contribute to exciting new technologies in computational lithography, enabling leading semiconductor companies that shape our lives.

Responsibilities

Design efficient data structures and algorithms, study software issues and deliver robust software.
Maintain and improve existing functionality, focused on quality, reliability, and performance
Design, architect, and create functional specifications for new software components and modules.
Collaborate closely with a cross-functional team, both within Chile and distributed world-wide.

Requirements

BS or MS in Computer Science, Engineering, or Mathematics
Good programming skills and some experience with C/C++
Background in data structures and algorithms
Familiarity in developing software on Linux
Desire to learn and explore new technologies, demonstrate good exploration and problem-solving skills
Good oral and written skills for communication and documentation

The Custom Design and Manufacturing Group provides market leading solutions for Custom Design, Circuit Simulation, Physical Verification, Process Technology Development, Advanced Lithography, and Manufacturing, driving the successful adoption of our best-in-class technologies and platforms at our broad and growing set of customers and partners across diverse market segments.

At Synopsys, we’re at the heart of the innovations that change the way we work and play. Self-driving cars. Artificial Intelligence. The cloud. 5G. The Internet of Things. These breakthroughs are ushering in the Era of Smart Everything. And we’re powering it all with the world’s most advanced technologies for chip design and software security. If you share our passion for innovation, we want to meet you.

Stay Connected: Join our Talent Community

Inclusion and Diversity are important to us. Synopsys considers all applicants for employment without regard to race, color, religion, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity, age, military veteran status, or disability.

• Agile development methodologies

Bain & Company is a global consultancy that helps the world’s most ambitious change makers define the future.

Across 64 cities in 39 countries, we work alongside our clients as one team with a shared ambition to achieve extraordinary results, outperform the competition, and redefine industries. We complement our tailored, integrated expertise with a vibrant ecosystem of digital innovators to deliver better, faster, and more enduring outcomes. Since our founding in 1973, we have measured our success by the success of our clients, and we proudly maintain the highest level of client advocacy in the industry.

Title: Ingeniera de implementación L2 (Service provider, Networking)
Location: Gran Santiago, Región Metropolitana de Santiago, Chile
Company_size: Más de 10.001 empleados · Servicios de TI y consultoría de TI
Apts: ['Implementación de soluciones', 'Ingeniería', 'Inglés', 'LAN-WAN', 'Networking', 'Planificación laboral', 'Proveedor de servicios de internet (ISP)', 'Tecnología de Cisco', 'Telecomunicaciones', 'Todos los filtros']
Description:
UN POCO SOBRE NOSOTROS
NTT es una multinacional japonesa de Tecnología y Telecomunicaciones, con presencia en múltiples países y continentes, siendo una de las empresas de tecnología más grandes del mundo. Se especializa en generar soluciones inteligentes para los negocios, el trabajo, la infraestructura y la ciberseguridad, ofreciendo servicios técnicos, de soporte, y de consultoría.

ACERCA DE ROL

NTT se encuentra en la búsqueda de una persona responsable de garantizar que los requisitos de la solución del cliente (Service Provider) se resuelvan de acuerdo con los niveles de servicio (SLA). Recoger necesidades de cliente, diseñar la solución de networking, ejecutar considerando las exigencias y respetando las best practices (Estándares) de la industria y del cliente.

PRINCIPALES RESPONSABILIDADES

Planificar/diseñar y ejecutar proyectos en red de service provider. (Networking)
Dominio avanzado de tecnologías de routing LAN/WAN con equipamiento Cisco, operando protocolos eBGP,iBGP,MP-BGP, VPN, MPLS, LDP, Multicast, EVPN, VXLAN, IP FABRIC, QoS, CoS, OSPF, EIGRP, PBR, Firewall filters, Tecnología SD-WAN, entre otros.
Dominio avanzado de tecnologías de switching LAN con equipamiento Cisco operando protocolos 802.1q, VXLAN, STP y sus variantes, MLAG y sus variantes, PAgP/LACP, entre otros.
Dominio avanzado de tecnologías de ciberseguridad con equipamiento Cisco operando firepower/ASA via FMC.
Conocimiento de fibra óptica/cableado estructurado, incluyendo tipos de cables, conectores, transceivers, ODF, para habilitar la correcta interconexión de enlaces ópticos.
Dominio en plataformas Cisco en IOS, IOS-XE.
Experiencia en diseño de soluciones de conectividad (LAN/WAN/DC).

REQUISITOS EXCLUYENTES
Titulación en carreras de Electrónica, Conectividad de Redes, Telecomunicaciones o similares.
Conocimientos del sector Telecomunicaciones. (Excluyente)
Certificación CCNP (Excluyente)
Experiencia en Service provider (Excluyente)

REQUISITOS DESEABLES
5+ años de experiencia laboral afín al cargo.
Inglés Intermedio, hablado y escrito.




ALGUNOS DE NUESTROS BENEFICIOS
Contamos con un seguro de vida 100% gratuito para colaboradores y colaboradoras y seguro de salud complementario co-financiado para que tú y toda tu familia directa estén asegurados.
Valoramos mucho el balance entre la vida profesional y personal por lo que ofrecemos días libres para ocasiones especiales y horarios flexibles.
Nos importa que nuestros colaboradores puedan aprender constantemente, por lo que contamos con varias licencias 100% gratuitas de plataformas como Linkedin Learning, Pink Elephant, Skillsoft, entre otras. Además, anualmente ofrecemos becas de estudio de postgrado y el pago de certificaciones técnicas.
Queremos generar el mejor ambiente y cultura dentro de la compañía, por lo que por segundo año consecutivo nos certificamos con Great Place to Work. Estamos dentro de las 20 mejores empresas para trabajar en Chile.
La salud es importante para todos, por lo que contamos con atención psicológica gratuita para todas las personas de la compañía y sus familiares. Además, pagamos los 3 primeros días de licencia médica 2 veces al año. Incluso, si tienes algún familiar enfermo, podrás solicitar hasta 3 días pagados al año, para cuidarlos.
Las festividades son para disfrutar, por eso entregamos aguinaldos en Fiestas Patrias y Navidad.
Nuestros colaboradores que tienen hijos pueden disfrutar de bonos para estudios, sala cuna y días libres, además de regalos en cada navidad, entre otros muchos beneficios.
La mayoría de nuestros cargos son 100% remotos. Sin embargo, para las personas que deben asistir de manera presencial, tenemos beneficios de movilización.
En NTT Ltd. tenemos la firme convicción de que la diversidad es el gran valor de nuestra organización. Por esto, todas nuestras vacantes están disponibles para todos quienes cumplan con la descripción del cargo. Somos una empresa inclusiva y queremos que seas parte de ella. La diversidad de género, LGBT+, edad, cultura/religión, etnia o discapacidad es bienvenida.

Title: Data Steward
Location: Chile
Company_size: Más de 10.001 empleados · Investigación biotecnológica
Apts: ['Calidad de datos', 'Customer-Focused Selling', 'Estrategia de datos', 'Estrategias de red', 'Gestión de datos', 'Gobierno de datos', 'Información de clientes', 'Jupyter', 'Procesos de negocio', 'Quality Reporting']
Description:
The Position

Our Vision

Our vision is to make CX as transformative as our science and be known for consistently creating seamless customer experiences that are as innovative and impactful as our medicines.

This is why we are evolving the LATAM Omnichannel team - to make this a reality by integrating digital and face-to-face interactions seamlessly and allowing us to rapidly identify priorities to engage our customers and establish leadership in the prioritized therapeutic areas.

The Position

As the Data Steward, you play a key role in LATAM’s omnichannel customer engagement transformation to drive customer centricity and create seamless customer experiences. You will be accountable for the quality of the customer data in the organization, ensuring the right adoption (and creation if needed) of business processes and that the Affiliate follows a consistent process for managing, storing and using data while taking into consideration local

requirements and regulations. You create a data-driven culture within your Affiliate and you promote a common understanding of the importance of having standardized data management processes in place and high quality data in order to ensure robust analysis and meaningful insights generation.

You report directly to the Omnichannel Strategist in the Affiliate and work closely with the Data Governance and Analytics Lead to tailor the Network strategy and guidance to local standards and requirements for data management and data governance.

You work closely with the Analytics & Insights Partner to monitor data quality performance KPIs and suggest areas for improvement at Affiliate and Network level. You are the local subject matter expert for master data and customer experience transactional data domains.

You are accountable for the local availability of customer data and the functionality of the tools, and inform the IT Business Partner of any data, systems and technical needs required to leverage the data.


Key Responsibilities

Execute local actions and data governance activities according to the Data Governance and Analytics Strategy and corporate policies, being responsible for quality of data and metadata (completeness, format and consistency of data), consistent local processes for data collection and maintenance to ensure availability, integrity, usability and security of data usage in the Affiliate
Partner closely with Global Programs (EpiCX, RDI, Aspire) and Products (e.g

Customer360, Personify), and the LATAM Business Technology team to align on the technology deployment roadmap. Flag any technical needs to ensure readiness and successful implementation on the data side in your Affiliate

Act as the local data expert of customer engagement programs and related

technological requirements (e.g. EpiCX), ensuring data availability and access control, master data management and life-cycle records and data change request oversight, guiding MDM, OM, Gigya, OCE-O & OCE-P/D configurations, leveraging tools and systems and supporting and testing of new releases (e.g for the EpiCx Integrated product this includes MDM, OM and OCE-P/D), participating as trainers, reporting and managing improvements to the Global OCE-P team

Leverage OCE-P/D to provide insight into utilization of fields and upstream data sources for business users and enable broader initiatives (e.g., segmentation, profiling)
Ensure data quality by maintaining (and update as required) organizational structures, hierarchies, territory alignments, product and customer alignments in OM system, in response to personnel or strategy changes periodically and/or as required
Maintain a constant data management process for data quality on Reltio, identifying duplicates and potential matches, following the flow of each source, ensuring Reltio is the only source of truth for customer registration, and approving DCRs originating from OCE and Gigya (digital portals)
Partner with the Analytics & Insights Partner to support specific digital data and local insights generation projects ensuring availability of high quality, clean and standardized*data and define, monitor and report data quality KPIs to track evolution and recommend on improvements
Communicate any data stewardship issues, inconsistencies and process implementation challenges to the Data Governance and Analytics Lead and coordinate the development of remediation plans and act as the Affiliate point of contact to the LATAM IT Business Partners, raising any business or technical needs (e.g. new data sources) in alignment with the Data Governance and Analytics Lead
Coach Channel Specialists and CX Specialists to apply best practices on data related processes and tools for the local execution of omnichannel cam paigns and implementation of closed-loop feedback strategies
Liaise with Affiliate Patient Journey Partners and Health System Partners to guide them and ensure customer data entries according to defined standards (PPoC Enabler role)
Drive data quality excellence and a mindset shift towards a data-driven culture by acting as the local point of contact for all data related business process changes and engage with the Organizational Change Management Lead to develop and lead end-user training
Collaborate with relevant functions locally and globally on continuous improvement to business processes by completing root cause investigations and governing customer and organizational master data
Manage and comply with any local regulatory requirements related to the above activities

What's in it for you?

This is a key role to enable Affiliates to execute local actions due data gover nanceactivities, ensuring to have high data quality, technical requirements and processes in place to leverage the power of data and insights
You will have the opportunity to steer our organization towards a data-driven culture and leverage the power of data to deliver truly personalized experiences for our customers

Role Interfaces

As the Data Steward, you will interact with the following:

Digital Customer Engagement & Insights - LATAM

○ Data Governance & Analytics Lead

○ CX Specialist

○ Channel Specialist

○ Analytics & Insights Partner

○ Business Technology Partner

Global

○ DCE&I Data & Tech

○ Global Programs (EpiCX, RDI, Aspire)

Other LATAM roles & functions

○ Patient Journey Partners (PJPs) & HSPs (Health System Partners)


Experience & Qualifications

Education

Bachelor degree (scientific, technical, digital, engineering, informatics, computer science* degree). An advanced degree in Life sciences and/ or MBA is a plus


Professional Experience

3+ years of professional experience with strong skills in managing large data sets, data quality, governance and data management systems (CRM) and data visualization (Tableau required, experience in Jupyter notebook and Amazon Athena is a plus)
Focused on business processes definition, to mobilize the organization from the creation of new ways of working to execution
Demonstrated experience in the area of Analytics, Data Strategy, Data Governance, Information Technology, Data Management and/ or Quality Reporting, especially within the marketing, media and commercial parts of the business
Self starter, with the skills, ability and passion to learn new tools and software quickly to become the local subject expert matter
Strong project management, planning and organizational skills demonstrated by the ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously
Strong collaboration and influencing skills demonstrated by effective contributions to cross-functional teams, ability to influence without authority among peers and management, ability to build strong, collaborative relationships
Intermediate level in programming (Python and SQL preferred) focused on the optimization and automatization of processes (e.g. extraction of data, automatization of Dashboards) is a plus

Languages

Fluent in English and Spanish (oral & written) is essential


Skills & Competencies

Competencies

Visionary: You have the vision to enhance customer engagement through a data-driven culture, using strategic capabilities to ensure high quality and standardized data to generate meaningful insights
Architect: You contribute to a team culture where you motivate others to leverage the power of data and take bold decisions to accelerate a personalized and omnichannel customer engagement
Catalyst: You have an entrepreneurial spirit, providing data management solutions and removing roadblocks for the Affiliate teams to act quickly upon evolving customer needs
Coach: You motivate and help Affiliate teams to build the skills and mindsets needed to ensure high quality data and ultimately build a data-driven culture

In addition, the following skills will make you successful in your position and career development at Roche:

Learning Agility
Outcomes Based Planning
Systems Thinking
Customer Centricity
Insights Generation
Performance Analytics
Analytics Automation
Data Management
Data Quality
Process Management

#dceilatamjobs

Who we are

At Roche, more than 100,000 people across 100 countries are pushing back the frontiers of healthcare. Working together, we’ve become one of the world’s leading research-focused healthcare groups. Our success is built on innovation, curiosity and diversity.

Roche is an Equal Opportunity Employer.

Title: Contract: Data Infrastructure Engineer
Location: Chile
Company_size: De 501 a 1.000 empleados · Tecnología, información e internet
Description:
Upwork ($UPWK) is the world’s work marketplace. We serve everyone from one-person startups to large, Fortune 100 enterprises with a powerful, trust-driven platform that enables companies and talent to work together in new ways that unlock their potential.

Last year, more than $3.8 billion of work was done through Upwork by skilled professionals who are gaining more control by finding work they are passionate about and innovating their careers.

This is an engagement through Upwork’s Hybrid Workforce Solutions (HWS) Team. Our Hybrid Workforce Solutions Team is a global group of professionals that support Upwork’s business. Our HWS team members are located all over the world.

Work/Project Scope:

Data Infrastructure team at Upwork is the center of engineering excellence for best practices relating to provisioning, maintenance, right-scaling, cost-effective use, use-appropriate targeting of many types of stateful storage technologies: transactional databases, document databases, cache/key-value stores, streaming data stores etc.

Data Infrastructure Engineer with DI team is a hyper-collaborative data infrastructure domain expert with a strong desire (and skills) to automate.

As Data Infrastructure Domain Expert you will:
Ensure that the Data Infrastructure team has a ready-to-apply library of best-in-class homework, templates and decision tree that matches data usage patterns with data storage technology tech that is most effective in addressing needs of feature development teams.
Keep technology vendor portfolio fresh through periodic data storage technology vendor scans, research, qualification and rating.
Drive excellence in engineering workflows, process design, technology choices supporting data storage lifecycle events like version upgrades, proactive right-scaling, predictive issue pattern formulation and automation supporting preemption of unplanned outages.
Design scale-appropriate data infrastructure governance process and automations that allow transparent, zero-downtime background servicing of hundreds of systems concurrently. Proactively eliminate manual servicing requirements through design of resilient data infrastructure systems and process automation.
Author self-service best practices for data consumption, performance monitoring tools and workflows. Proactively advocate adaption of these by feature development teams.
In collaboration with Data Science, Data Processing teams innovate data storage systems interfaces in support for ETL, data transformation and data quality systems with eye on low maintenance costs, low latency, higher throughput, simplicity of use.
Be the domain expert for a set of storage technologies, including intimate understanding of query expression language/APIs, tuning, scaling, horizontal resiliency options.

As Collaborative Solutions Innovator you will:
Constantly gather input from feature development teams using our data infrastructure, identify developer experience improvement opportunities, design systems that prevent data infrastructure related incidents, guide feature teams towards safe systems use.
Collaborate directly with "storage" teams of various cloud providers (AWS, GCP) in driving combined innovation and engineering standard methodologies. Help design, drive, coordinate case studies targeting improvements in design and use of vendored data storage systems.
Integrate components and input from core infrastructure, information security and other internal "building blocks" teams in constructing data storage solutions.
Participate in multi-department risk assessment exercises and design systemic mitigating solutions pertaining to data infrastructure security, disaster recoverability, business continuity.

As Process Automation Specialist you will:
Discover, pursue, document ineffective manual processes relating to the lifecycle of Data Infrastructure maintenance and use. Propose, implement process automation, using corporate workflow automation platforms, decision capture workflows.
Individually create services, expose internal APIs for these services that allow other teams, workflows leverage data infrastructure automation components.
Design multi-department process workflows and integrations supporting data infrastructure lifecycle. Manage delivery dependencies outsourced to other teams.
Participate in on-call, incidence mitigation sessions. Capture experiences related to manual activities and convert them into automation primitives supporting self-service use by feature development, SRE, data-consuming teams.

Must Haves (Required Skills):
Demonstrable expertise (deployment, use) in some of the following data storage technologies: Postgres/MySQL (“on-prem”, RDS, Aurora), Kafka / Kinesis (“on-prem” or managed), ElasticSearch/OpenSearch/Mongo, Redis/Memcache, analytical databases like Snowflake/Clickhouse/Greenplum, data federation engines like Presto/Trino/Dremio/Athena.
Demonstrable prior experience with Terraform for managing cloud infrastructure. Kubernetes, CloudFormation, Hashicorp Packer, Chef/Ansible knowledge are huge pluses.
Demonstrable familiarity with engineering workflow automation tools like ArgoCD/Workflow, AirFlow, Jenkins.
Strong scripting experience with Python (preferred), shell (secondary).
Significant prior exposure to cloud vendors AWS (preferred), GCP, Azure. Demonstrable knowledge of specifics of resource creation and policy (permissions) management in cloud environments.
Persistent drive to learn new things and deepen your expertise.

You are a natural fit if:
You have done projects like these before and are looking for a friendly, meritocratic, engineering-excellence-focused environment to call home.

Minimum qualifications:

Bachelor's degree or equivalent practical experience.

About The Job

At Google, we aim to foster Googley work environments that are collaborative, friendly and fun. The Facilities Management team brings our spaces to life as you oversee the daily operations of our offices. While roles with similar names at other companies can be far more mundane, you're a creative, organized customer service specialist, who takes pride in seeing things run smoothly and efficiently. You go out of your way to make sure that clients are not only satisfied, but singing Google's praises. You're comfortable in a fast-paced environment with the highest standards of excellence. You aren't afraid to have fun with your job, and bring an enthusiasm, dedication and a collaborative spirit to build and maintain office spaces that facilitate some of the world's most cutting edge innovation.

Behind everything our users see online is the architecture built by the Technical Infrastructure team to keep it running. From developing and maintaining our data centers to building the next generation of Google platforms, we make Google's product portfolio possible. We're proud to be our engineers' engineers and love voiding warranties by taking things apart so we can rebuild them. We keep our networks up and running, ensuring our users have the best and fastest experience possible.

Inform key stakeholders about current work and discuss strategic decisions and directions with them.
Oversee technical leads and team leads through the completion of required maintenance, troubleshooting, and repair tasks to maintain equipment to global standards.

Description:
About The Position

Who we are:

We’re the most successful startup you’ve never heard of. We’ve saved 3 million

Americans over a billion dollars on their medications since we were founded in 2017. We’re focused on making medications more affordable and convenient to purchase and we’re giving consumers and their families the power to make better choices and lead healthier lives. We are a product-forward company that knows how to execute quickly, build things right, and be good to each other while we do it.

And we’re small. No smaller than that. Eight engineers including management (hint you manage yourself).

We don’t hire often and when we do it’s normally through referrals. So if you’re reading this, chances are you got it from someone who works here… ask them what it’s like!

What we’re looking for:

We’re looking for an experienced Data Scientist to join our remote team. You need to be a strong problem solver who can act with very little oversight and deliver high-quality solutions.

We work in a very challenging business domain, the US HealthCare space. An important part of the role will be learning this domain and then applying that knowledge to solve complex problems. The scope of this role is very broad and you will be expected to have an opinion on the approach to pricing and data analytics for the entire company.

Responsibilities:

The main responsibilities include (but are definitely not limited to):
Strategize, test and implement Hippo’s pricing algorithms across multiple partners and pricing sources;
Customer retention analysis and strategies to improve customer loyalty and LTV;
Work hand-in-hand with Hippo’s data Engineers to implement strategic solutions and load new pricing, drug information etc.;
Claim analysis and invoicing;
Adhoc analysis based on business requirements with both SQL and Python;
Keep our data safe. We are very serious about our customers' personal medical information

Requirements:
5+ years of data analysis and/or working with Data Solutions
Strong Python / Pandas and SQL skills
Good product thinking and ability to work independently towards goals
Know the difference between simple and easy
Excellent communication skills
Healthcare experience is a big plus

Requirements

None

Benefits

Vacaciones / Flexibilidad de Trabajo
Trabajo Remoto: Globalmente remoto

Description:
Our Company

Changing the world through digital experiences is what Adobe’s all about. We give everyone—from emerging artists to global brands—everything they need to design and deliver exceptional digital experiences! We’re passionate about empowering people to create beautiful and powerful images, videos, and apps, and transform how companies interact with customers across every screen.

We’re on a mission to hire the very best and are committed to creating exceptional employee experiences where everyone is respected and has access to equal opportunity. We realize that new ideas can come from everywhere in the organization, and we know the next big idea could be yours!

The opportunity

We’re searching for a Solutions Consultant to join our team!

What you'll do

As a Solution Consultant, you’ll act as a trusted advisor to our customers - the world's most innovative companies! Understanding their business landscape and objectives and demonstrating and articulating the value of the Adobe Experience Cloud solutions and how they optimise and support their digital strategies and tackle their most important business challenges. You'll provide our customers with advice on digital change, helping them to utilise Adobe Analytics, Customer Journey Analytics, Real-Time CDP and Adobe Target to strengthen their brand and grow their business.

As a core member of the team, you’ll collaborate with and support our sales and customer success organisations.

The ideal candidate will have a blended technical and digital marketing background with a good eye for presentation and compelling demonstrations. You’ll have the confidence to discuss our solutions and technology with both marketing and IT customer at all levels.

What you need to succeed

You’ll need the following skills to be successful:

A strong understanding of marketing or ad technology and how this can drive digital transformation e.g. analytics, personalization, CDP, DSP
A strong understanding of digital marketing and emerging trends
Ability to identify the critical business issues that customers are facing and provide solution approaches
Exceptional presentation skills, conversational skills and experience as a trusted advisor
Expert in building and presenting use cases and value propositions
Strong demonstration and value-selling experience
Crafting end-to-end user experiences, using innovative ways to combining content, web journey, personalised experiences and marketing automation
Self-motivated with a strong aim to succeed in a highly dynamic environment
Ability to multi-task in a fast-paced environment
Maintain an understanding of competitors, especially strengths and weaknesses of competitor solutions
Develop & maintain authoritative understanding of digital technologies and marketing trends
Provide creative and strategic content/input as part of the RFP or proposal process, presentations and client case studies
Participate in customer workshops, presentations, and other working sessions as required
Native fluency in Spanish, proficient in English

The following requirements are relevant to this role:

Experience in a technical pre-sales, consulting, specific industry or digital marketing environment
Experience of Adobe Analytics, Adobe Target, Adobe Audience Manager would be a benefit.

Description:
Somos un equipo joven con ganas de generar un impacto social en el mercado de cara a los almaceneros de barrio de Chile (y más adelante Latam), a través de un modelo de oferta y demanda que permita a los dueños de almacenes organizarse de mejor manera para abastecer su negocio pudiendo comprar una gran variedad de mercadería y bebestibles a través de una aplicación fácil y amigable de usar. Como equipo nos gusta que las cosas sucedan rápido, nos adueñamos de los problemas que vemos en el día a día e intentamos resolverlos de manera íntegra con el equipo, siempre de manera colaborativa, empática y honesta. Nos gusta aprender y estar al tanto de lo que ocurre a nuestro alrededor, incluso le sacamos provecho a los errores que cometemos, aprendiendo de ellos para no volver a cometerlos en un futuro. Tenemos modalidad híbrida, pudiendo venir a nuestra oficina ubicada en Providencia, Santiago, pero también teniendo la facilidad de trabajar desde casa o desde otro lugar :)

Funciones del cargo

Actualmente estamos en búsqueda de nuestr@ próxim@ Data Scientist Jr, quien será el responsable de apoyar al área de compras de la empresa, rediseñando el modelo de predicción de compras y automatizando la comunicación con nuestros proveedores para asegurarse que el modelo de abastecimiento de la compañía, de manera de tener una oferta relevante para nuestr@s almacener@s. El trabajo tiene modalidad híbrida y flexibilidad horaria, debiendo ir a nuestra bodega ubicada en Pudahuel para revisar los procesos, pero también teniendo la opción de trabajar desde nuestra oficina ubicada en Providencia o desde donde quieras :)

Tareas a realizar en tu día a día

Rediseñar el modelo predicción de compras de la empresa
Automatizar la comunicación entre el área de compras de Yom y nuestros proveedores
Robustecer el modelo de datos
Implementación de modelo y procesos de compras en nuestra bodega, mejorando y haciendo más eficiente nuestra logística de abastecimiento

Requerimientos del cargo

Competencias y calificaciones básicas

Sabes trabajar con múltiples fuentes de datos. Entiendes cómo se relacionan unas con otras y cómo se integran entre ellas.
Usas alguna herramienta de análisis de datos que pueda ser reproducible (no Excel, usamos R o python)
Conocimientos en estadística: descriptiva, inferencial y prescriptiva. Entendimiento de diseño y análisis de experimentos.
Entiendes y sabes cómo funcionan procesos de ETL. Tendrás que ayudar en la definición de estos
Sabes trabajar con alguna herramienta de visualización (Power BI, Tableau, Data Studio, etc). No nos importa cual sea, si no sabes usar la que usamos acá, puedes aprenderlo.
Capacidad y ganas de trabajar en equipo, con espíritu colaborativo

Ganas Puntos Si

Tienes nociones básicas de logística y supply chain (somos en la raíz, una empresa de abastecimiento).
Sabes y/o te interesaría aprender tópicos relacionados a machine learning y cómo esto se aplica en el negocio.

Condiciones

We are looking for contributors in Chile to read and record short sentences through our Appen Mobile app.



In this project, Appen is collecting English speech data to train and develop artificial intelligence algorithms that will be used to improve speech recognition technologies.



Task: The task contains a total of 435 short sentences that you will have to read from the screen and record through the Appen Mobile app. You will have to follow the sentences written in English. There is no need to create your own sentences. An example of a sentence that you will have to read: “Okay Alexa, I need directions to get to work.”



Duration: Each sentence will take an average of 3 to 6 seconds. Plan 2 hours to record the 435 sentences. Of course, we recommend that you stop from time to time to rest. We will give you at least 7 days to record your session.



Payment: Payment will be made once you submit ALL 435 verified recordings. If any of your 435 audio recordings are not accepted, we will pay you pro rata with an acceptance rate of at least 80%.

if you have an Android mobile, it has to be from 2017 or newer
Be a native English speaker living in Chile
Know how to record in a very quiet environment, free from any background noise.

Title: Data Engineer (Remote) (12000 USD/Mes)
Location: Gran Santiago, Región Metropolitana de Santiago, Chile
Company_size: De 11 a 50 empleados · Tecnología, información e internet
Apts: ['Almacenamiento de datos', 'Análisis de datos', 'Apache Kafka', 'Arquitectura de sistemas', 'Container Orchestration', 'Extraer, transformar y cargar (ETL)', 'Hive', 'Ingeniería de datos', 'Microsoft Power BI', 'Visualización de datos']
Description:
About The Position

WHAT WE DO Imagine if every time you went to the doctor you paid cash upfront before you are treated, where every time you rented an apartment you paid 2 years cash upfront, or where your monthly paycheck is frequently delayed for months at a time. Then imagine doing that without a loan, credit card, or even bank accounts. This is everyday life for over 3 billion people in developing countries around the world. We are Migo, and we are on a mission to change this by re-inventing the way people access and use credit. Through a simple API integration to our platform, companies can enable their customers to make purchases and pay bills on credit, or get personal loans. Leveraging proprietary datasets, Migo builds ML algorithms on customer phone records, bank records, and payment transactions to assess credit risk, enabling us to offer credit lines to individuals and small businesses. This credit line can be used to make purchases from a merchant or withdraw cash without the need for point-of-sale hardware or plastic cards. Because of our proprietary data and innovative technical solutions, Migo is able to provide credit to underbanked customers who are not typically covered by credit bureaus, a critical area of growth for developing countries. RESPONSIBILITIES OF THE ROLE Are you a data engineer ready to help us redefine credit for the 21st century? We are on a mission to leverage data from partners around the globe to perform credit scoring for 3 billion people. The opportunities for you to make an impact are limitless. As an experienced data engineer, we would look to you to design a high-capacity data pipeline architecture as well as design data governance policies while ensuring privacy and security of sensitive data. You will develop scalable data management systems and manage the storage of large datasets. You will be involved with creating performant and reliable ETL jobs, as well as manage external data feeds across on-premise and cloud infrastructure. WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR As a data pipeline engineer, you will develop scalable data management systems and manage the storage of large datasets. We would be looking to you to create performant and reliable ETL jobs, as well as manage external data feeds across on-premise and cloud infrastructure. You are also a clear and concise communicator and can communicate ideas to a wide range of stakeholders, both technical and non-technical. You appreciate hearing different points of view and wait to hear other's point of view before offering your own. You have a pragmatic approach to building systems, see multiple ways of solving problems, and can discuss the tradeoffs of each solution. You are technology agnostic with a broad depth of experience using many different technologies. You have traveled extensively or have lived in a developing country. You are empathetic, self-aware, and respect all cultures. You are fun and enlightening to work with, and you have a good work/life balance with hobbies and interests you are happy to share with others. In the first 90 days you will: - Rewrite our big data ETL pipeline to create datasets for our modeling efforts - Wrangle with raw data from large, diverse data sets from our distribution partners - Automate data integrity checks - Connect our various databases to our BI platform OUR TECH STACK Our technology stack consists of modern tools; we are open to technologies and pick the right tool for the job: - Python for Machine Learning e.g. (Scikit-learn and PyTorch) - Python/Scala for data pipelines - Scala/Java/Python for micro-services and APIs - Swagger(OpenAPI) for API documentation - Docker and Kubernetes to package and run services - AWS for underlying infrastructure - On-premise servers for data processing and extraction at our partners Requirements - Degree in a relevant technical field or equivalent experience - 5+ years of experience building production-quality software infrastructure - Experience developing ETL jobs - Fluency in SQL and experience with RDBMSs - Fluency in Python data tools e.g. Pandas, Dask, or Pyspark - Experience designing and building big data pipelines - Experience working on large scale, distributed systems Desirable - Experience working with AWS, GCP, or other cloud-based services - Experience at a rapidly growing startup or with cutting-edge teams at a larger tech company

Requirements

None

Benefits

Vacaciones / Flexibilidad de Trabajo
Trabajo Remoto: Globalmente remoto

Description:
Our Company

Changing the world through digital experiences is what Adobe’s all about. We give everyone—from emerging artists to global brands—everything they need to design and deliver exceptional digital experiences! We’re passionate about empowering people to create beautiful and powerful images, videos, and apps, and transform how companies interact with customers across every screen.

We’re on a mission to hire the very best and are committed to creating exceptional employee experiences where everyone is respected and has access to equal opportunity. We realize that new ideas can come from everywhere in the organization, and we know the next big idea could be yours!

The opportunity

Crafting end-to-end user experiences, using innovative ways to combining content, web journey, personalised experiences and marketing automation

Title: Analytics and Insights Partner
Location: Chile
Company_size: Más de 10.001 empleados · Investigación biotecnológica
Apts: ['Analítica', 'Análisis de marketing', 'Compromiso de los clientes', 'Conocimientos comerciales', 'Customer-Focused Selling', 'Gestión de partes interesadas', 'Gobierno de datos', 'Indicadores clave de desempeño', 'Pensamiento sistémico', 'Veeva Vault']
Description:
The Position

Our Vision

Our vision is to make CX as transformative as our science and be known for consistently creating seamless customer experiences that are as innovative and impactful as our medicines. This is why we are evolving the LATAM Omnichannel team - to make this a reality by integrating digital and face-to-face interactions seamlessly and allowing us to rapidly identify priorities to engage our customers and establish leadership in the prioritized therapeutic areas.

The Position

As the Analytics and Insights Partner you play a key role in LATAM’s omnichannel customer engagement transformation to drive customer centricity and create seamless customer experiences.

You are responsible to actively collect, analyze and generate insights in a consistent and homogeneous way to support the Network and local teams in their activities to gather customer feedback, segment customers based on their preferences and measure campaign and channel performance, with the overall aim to create personalized customer experiences. You will be working closely with the Global Ecosystem Insights and Advance Analytics teams and Global data management and analytics programs (e.g. EpiCX, RDI) to drive a data-driven culture and insights driven next best actions as it relates to personalized customer engagements.

As part of the LATAM Network Team you will be reporting to the Data Governance & Analytics Lead and directly work with the Network and Affiliate teams to provide on-demand support in their various data analytics and insights generation activities. This can include the creation, maintenance and optimization of dashboards to measure performance of campaigns, channels and content across customer segments, establishing digital customer feedback loops in accordance with the continuous learning and closed-loop feedback strategy and finally creating valuable customer insights. You will be supporting the Business and Customer Success Lead in conducting business reviews by analyzing the KPIs related to the defined outcomes. Based on this, you will also make recommendations for improvements to ensure customer and business success.

You will also be working with the Omnichannel Outcomes Leads to create the measurement plans for the TA omnichannel strategies.


Key Responsibilities

You are responsible for the effective translation of data into valuable insights across all digital (e.g. HCP Portal, emailing, remote engagement, social media) and non-digital touchpoints within the omnichannel TA strategies and their effective communication to various stakeholder groups
Define criteria to prioritize analytics and insights generation demand across LATAM and Affiliates with Network and local stakeholders
Support the Business and Customer Excellence Lead in conducting Regional and Affiliate business reviews by sharing key performance indicators aligned to the defined outcomes, and recommend areas for improvement and action plans where appropriate
Collaborate with Channel Specialists to determine the value and effectiveness of all types of channels, translating incoming data into business results and generated impact
Collaborate with Content Partners to monitor and measure campaign and content performance to showcase their effectiveness and results of marketing campaigns
Partner with the Customer Insights Lead to operationalize customer segmentation into the data collection process and generate meaningful insights for each segment
Ensure alignment and standardization of the data and insights quality according to the Data Governance and Analytics Strategy and coordinate with Data Stewards in the Affiliates to define any actions needed to improve data quality standards
Lead / participate in regional digital analytics projects (e.g. HCP Portal analysis) and liaise with Data Governance & Analytics Lead to raise any business or technical needs (e.g. new data sources)
Within LATAM Network and Affiliate teams and with Global Programs, act as the translator between data experts and the business, facilitating cross functional collaboration
Leverage the Network to capture learnings and create synergies between Affiliates in data gathering and insights generation processes, and share them with Data Governance & Analytics Lead in order to iterate in the Data Governance and Analytics Strategy
Manage and comply with any regulatory requirements related to the above activities
Actively eliminate low value activities, and continuously reevaluate the prioritization and focus of the teams to drive the business forward on highest priorities, while creating synergies and eliminating duplication
Ensure that research is conducted with the highest degree of integrity, in compliance with appropriate policies and SOPs, and that learnings are shared broadly and archived effectively for future reference

What's in it for you?

This is a key role to enable Roche’s new omnichannel customer engagement vision which will provide you will opportunities to work with Senior LATAM stakeholders
You will have the opportunity to work in a Network role and support Affiliates in gaining valuable insights of their customers through the application of data analytics and visualizations helping them to optimize their omnichannel engagement strategies

Role Interfaces

As the Analytics & Insights Partner, you will interact with the following:

Digital Customer Engagement & Insights - LATAM

○ Business and Customer Excellence Lead

○ Customer Insights Lead

○ Data Governance & Analytics Lead

○ CX Specialist

○ Channel Specialist

○ Content Partner

Global

○ Global Ecosystem Insights

○ Global Programs (e.g. EpiCX, RDI, Aspire)

Other LATAM roles & functions

○ Patient Journey Partners (PJPs) & HSPs (Health System Partners)


Experience & Qualifications

Education

Bachelor's degree (scientific, digital, economic or business degree). An advanced degree in Life sciences and/ or MBA is a plus


Professional Experience

5+ years experience in Analytics Translation (i.e translate analytics into insights), Performance Analytics and proven skills working with Data & Analytics platforms, Tableau and Digital Landscape, Channel & Touchpoint Analytics (web, search, social, email, chat, virtual meetings / conferences etc.) and Campaign Analytics
Excellent analytical and problem solving skills with the ability to translate complex data sets into valuable insights for various stakeholder groups through dashboards and visualization tools
Experience with digital, omnichannel, and associated data/analytics capabilities in large biopharma environments is highly desirable
Experience in understanding customer experiences in a healthcare system set-up and acting on them, improving HCP and patient satisfaction is highly desirable
Ability to understand and translate marketing analytics reports, experience in VVPM (Veeva Vault PromoMats) Content Sharing (DAM) and Approval (MLR) process
Experience in Jupyter notebook, Amazon Athena and Google Analytics is a plus
Excellent project and stakeholder management, interpersonal and organizational skills, as well as the ability to handle multiple projects, demand, priorities and stakeholders simultaneously

Languages

Fluent in English and Spanish (oral & written) is essential


Skills & Competencies

Competencies

Visionary: You have the vision to enhance customer engagement through a data-driven culture, using creative strategic approaches to generate valuable customer insights and enable the team to act on them

Description:
We are looking for contributors in Chile to read and record short sentences through our Appen Mobile app.



In this project, Appen is collecting English speech data to train and develop artificial intelligence algorithms that will be used to improve speech recognition technologies.



Task: The task contains a total of 435 short sentences that you will have to read from the screen and record through the Appen Mobile app. You will have to follow the sentences written in English. There is no need to create your own sentences. An example of a sentence that you will have to read: “Okay Alexa, I need directions to get to work.”



Duration: Each sentence will take an average of 3 to 6 seconds. Plan 2 hours to record the 435 sentences. Of course, we recommend that you stop from time to time to rest. We will give you at least 7 days to record your session.



Payment: Payment will be made once you submit ALL 435 verified recordings. If any of your 435 audio recordings are not accepted, we will pay you pro rata with an acceptance rate of at least 80%.




Requirements:



Have a recent smartphone
if you have an iPhone, it has to be 8 or newer
if you have an Android mobile, it has to be from 2017 or newer
Be a native English speaker living in Chile
Know how to record in a very quiet environment, free from any background noise.



Thank you and we hope to work with you soon!



"Appen has a diverse, inclusive culture that is vital to our mission of helping build better AI. We offer opportunities for individuals of all abilities and backgrounds."

Description:
Bci Corredores de Seguros busca un Business Development con la misión de aumentar la rentabilidad de la cartera vigente de clientes Bci a través del control de la fuga, aumento del cruce de productos y gestión de la experiencia cliente. Para lograrlo, el foco del trabajo está en analizar los indicadores claves de gestión y liderar proyectos que los mejoren, logrando un impacto directo en los ingresos de la empresa.

En este rol tendrás la oportunidad de:

Rol fundamental para la generación de iniciativas asegurando la toma de decisiones en base a datos que permitan el crecimiento del stock, retención y fidelización de clientes. Dada la naturaleza del cargo, se debe validar que los proyectos/iniciativas estén alineados con los objetivos propios del negocio (rol cuestionador) con el fin de validar hipótesis que impacten la permanencia y crecimiento del negocio. Finalmente, se debe identificar oportunidades, implementando constantemente controles y procesos, apoyándose en la innovación y prácticas de la industria y el mercado. - Diseñar y liderar iniciativas que aumenten la rentabilidad final de la cartera. - Analizar los motivos y causas de la fuga de clientes, proporcionando información clave para la toma de decisiones estratégicas. - Asesorar íntegramente a ejecutivos para propiciar una excelente primera impresión de cara al cliente, evitando problemas de postventa. - Implementar campañas de fidelización de cara al cliente, con foco en mejorar su experiencia. - Medir y mostrar el impacto de las iniciativas implementadas y resultados obtenidos. Sumado a lo anterior, se debe apoyar con información para robustecer la toma de decisión y validar hipótesis que impacten el crecimiento y performance de los distintos seguros.

Modalidad de trabajo del cargo:

Mixto, días remotos semanales.

Para tener éxito en esta posición necesitas:

Ingeniero Comercial, Civil Industrial o a fin. - 2 o más años de experiencia. - Manejo de Excel (debe saber BUSCARV). - Experiencia en liderazgo de proyectos.

Es aún mejor si tienes:

Fuertes habilidades interpersonales.

Condiciones:

Plazo fijo

Description:
WHAT MAKES US A GREAT PLACE TO WORK

We are proud to be consistently recognized as one of the world's best places to work, a champion of diversity and a model of social responsibility. We are a Glassdoor Best Place to Work and we have maintained a spot in the top four since its founding in 2009. We believe that diversity, inclusion and collaboration are key to building extraordinary teams. We hire people with exceptional talents, abilities and potential, then create an environment where you can become the best version of yourself and thrive both professionally and personally.




WHO YOU’LL WORK WITH

Working alongside our generalist consultants, Bain's Advanced Analytics Group (AAG) helps clients across industries solve their biggest problems using our expertise in data science, engineering, customer insights, statistics, machine learning, data management, and supply chain analytics. Stationed in our global offices, AAG team members hold advanced degrees in computer science, engineering, AI, data science, physics, statistics, mathematics, and other quantitative disciplines, with backgrounds in a variety of fields including tech, data science, marketing analytics and academia.




Core Responsibilities

• Lead the entire software development life cycle, including architecture design, writing clean code, conducting code reviews, writing documentation, unit/integration tests, identifying issues and resolutions

• Collaborate with leaders of other expert tracks – for example, Design and Innovation Experts to ensure Bain and Global Engineering are bringing the optimal combination of expertise to deliver results for our clients.

• Collaborate closely with and influence business consulting staff and leaders as part of multi-disciplinary teams to assess opportunities and develop product solutions for Bain clients across a variety of sectors.

• Advise and coach client engineering teams on technology stack best practices and operational models to raise their engineering capabilities.

• Lead cross-functional and multi-organizational product teams in planning and execution phases for clients. Take an active role in ideation and discovery processes. Identify, assess, track and mitigate issues, risks and bottlenecks. Provide expert guidance on operational planning themes including security, scalability, testing and resilience.

• Influence, educate and directly support the application engineering capabilities of our clients, often at the executive level.

• Travel is required (30%)




Requirements

• Master’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related technical field.

• 3+ years at Senior or Staff level, or equivalent

• Experience with client-side technologies such as React, Angular, Vue.js, HTML and CSS

• Experience with server-side technologies such as Node.js, Django, Flask, .NET Core or Java Spring Boot

• Experience with Cloud platforms and services (AWS, Azure, GCP, etc)

• 2+ years of Python

• Experience implementation of large-scale structured or unstructured databases, orchestration and container technologies such as Docker or Kubernetes

• Strong interpersonal and communication skills, including the ability to explain and discuss complex mathematical and machine learning technicalities with colleagues and clients from other disciplines at their level of cognition

• Curiosity, proactivity and critical thinking

• Strong computer science fundaments in data structures, algorithms, automated testing, object-oriented programming, performance complexity, and implications of computer architecture on software performance.

• Strong knowledge in designing API interfaces

• Knowledge of data architecture, database schema design and database scalability

• Agile development methodologies




ABOUT US:

Bain & Company is a global consultancy that helps the world’s most ambitious change makers define the future.

Across 64 cities in 39 countries, we work alongside our clients as one team with a shared ambition to achieve extraordinary results, outperform the competition, and redefine industries. We complement our tailored, integrated expertise with a vibrant ecosystem of digital innovators to deliver better, faster, and more enduring outcomes. Our 10-year commitment to invest more than $1 billion in pro bono services brings our talent, expertise, and insight to organizations tackling today’s urgent challenges in education, racial equity, social justice, economic development, and the environment. Since our founding in 1973, we have measured our success by the success of our clients, and we proudly maintain the highest level of client advocacy in the industry.

Description:
Build your future with Sovos.

If you are looking for an opportunity where career-minded professionals can achieve success while bringing their best and whole selves to work each day, Sovos may be the company you have been looking for. Employees at Sovos operate on the leading edge of digital technology while working to improve lives and the communities in which we live and work. When we say Solve Tax for Good, we mean For Good in every sense of the word. Our organizational commitment is to provide a place where employees can thrive and progress in their careers while having the support behind them that only a global company can offer.

Sound like this might be the opportunity you have been looking for?

Take a look at our career posting below. Don’t check all the boxes? Apply anyway! We are focused on hiring the right people, not the “right” resume.

It’s not about what you have done somewhere else, it’s all about what you are capable of doing here.

The Work You'll Do

Using the latest technologies such as GitHub Enterprise, Jenkins, Puppet, and RunDeck, the Dev Ops Engineer works closely with Agile Development teams and SaaS Operations department to understand, analyze and design quality technical solutions that support our Agile Software Development Life Cycle model. The Dev Ops Engineer will design and implement multiple applications’ build, release, deployment, and configuration activities

More Specifically You Will
Define and implement processes to maintain software products’ configuration and infrastructure servers’ configuration
Maintain applications and tools within the Development team throughout the SDLC
Create documentation following industry standards for process definition and user training purposes
Work within an agile team to develop software solutions and provide guidance of best practices within Configuration Management
Re-evaluate current Configuration Management practices to propose improvements regularly
What We Need From You
Knowledge of SaaS technologies and SDLC processes
Experience with scripting languages such as Powershell
Familiarity with private repositories, such as GitHub preferred
Ability to meet strict deadlines
Some off-hour responsibilities
What Does Sovos Offer You?

The tols to enhance your life - because we want you to enjoy your life outside of work and inside!
Mentoring Programs
Management Bootcamps and Development Trainings
Yearly performance reviews where compensation and performance are assessed and rewarded generously
Clear paths for growth within our roles (but we know that career development can be like a spider web, not a ladder - we give you the tools to move outside of your career as well!
Generous time off and benefits
Sovos is an equal opportunity employer committed to providing an environment that celebrates diversity and where equal employment opportunities are available to all applicants and employees. We do not discriminate against race, color, religions, national origin, age, sex, marital status, physical or mental disability, veteran status, gender identity, sexual orientation, or any other characteristic provided by law. At Sovos, all employees are encouraged to bring their whole selves to work.

Company Background

Sovos was built to solve the complexities of the digital transformation of tax, with complete, connected offerings for tax determination, continuous transaction controls, tax reporting and more. Sovos customers include half the Fortune 500, as well as businesses of every size operating in more than 70 countries. The company’s SaaS products and proprietary Sovos S1 Platform integrate with a wide variety of business applications and government compliance processes. Sovos has employees throughout the Americas and Europe, and is owned by Hg and TA Associates. For more information visit www.sovos.com and follow us on LinkedIn and Twitter

Apts: ['Alexa', 'Algoritmos', 'Android', 'Aplicaciones móviles', 'Español', 'Inglés', 'Inteligencia artificial', 'Procesamiento de lenguaje natural', 'Recogida de datos', 'Reconocimiento de voz', 'Todos los filtros']
Description:
We are looking for contributors in Chile to read and record short sentences through our Appen Mobile app.


In this project, Appen is collecting Spanish speech data to train and develop artificial intelligence algorithms that will be used to improve speech recognition technologies.


Task: The task contains a total of 435 short sentences that you will have to read from the screen and record through the Appen Mobile app. You will have to follow the sentences written in English. There is no need to create your own sentences. An example of a sentence that you will have to read: “Okay Alexa, I need directions to get to work.”


Duration: Each sentence will take an average of 3 to 6 seconds. Plan 2 hours to record the 435 sentences. Of course, we recommend that you stop from time to time to rest. We will give you at least 7 days to record your session.


Payment: Payment will be made once you submit ALL 435 verified recordings. If any of your 435 audio recordings are not accepted, we will pay you pro rata with an acceptance rate of at least 80%.


Requirements:

Have a recent smartphone
if you have an iPhone, it has to be 8 or newer
if you have an Android mobile, it has to be from 2017 or newer
Be a native Spanish speaker living in Chile
Know how to record in a very quiet environment, free from any background noise.


Thank you and we hope to work with you soon!


"Appen has a diverse, inclusive culture that is vital to our mission of helping build better AI. We offer opportunities for individuals of all abilities and backgrounds."

Description:
Job Summary

As a Regulatory Submissions Coordinator you will have the opportunity to work within Regulatory Submissions, supporting our many projects and gaining some vital experience. You will be a productive member of the team, and will be mentored and supported as you develop your skills. Working directly with Regulatory Submissions Coordinators, you will gain valuable hands on experience to enable you to develop a career in clinical research.

Responsibilities
Provide day-to-day departmental/project support activities, such as collection of vital documents for ethics submissions and preparation of study documents to competent authorities;
Support Regulatory Submission Managers and Start Up teams in ensuring deadlines are adhered to;
Conduct quality control of documents;
Maintain spreadsheets and compile reports; and
Provide advice and guidance to internal and external team members to ensure compliance with applicable regulations and requirements;
Perform other tasks as needed.
Qualifications
Bachelor's degree is required (preferably in a Life Sciences field);
At least 3 - 4 years of regulatory submissions experience;
Excellent organizational and prioritization skills;
Knowledge of Microsoft Office;
Great attention to detail and excellent oral and written communication skills; and
Fluency in spoken and written English.
We kindly ask to submit applications in English.
Medpace Overview

Medpace is a full-service clinical contract research organization (CRO). We provide Phase I-IV clinical development services to the biotechnology, pharmaceutical and medical device industries. Our mission is to accelerate the global development of safe and effective medical therapeutics through its scientific and disciplined approach. We leverage local regulatory and therapeutic expertise across all major areas including oncology, cardiology, metabolic disease, endocrinology, central nervous system, anti-viral and anti-infective. Headquartered in Cincinnati, Ohio, employing more than 5,000 people across 40+ countries.

Why Medpace?

When you join Medpace, you become part of a team dedicated to supporting the development of ground-breaking drugs and devices. Our employees provide hope for those living with debilitating diseases. We invite you to be a part of something that is impacting millions of people around the globe while enjoying a competitive total compensation and benefits package and internal growth opportunities.

Awards
Medpace historically named a Top Cincinnati Workplace by the Cincinnati Enquirer
Recognized by Forbes as one of America's Best Mid-size Companies in 2021

Our Company

Changing the world through digital experiences is what Adobe’s all about. We give everyone—from emerging artists to global brands—everything they need to design and deliver exceptional digital experiences! We’re passionate about empowering people to create beautiful and powerful images, videos, and apps, and transform how companies interact with customers across every screen.

We’re searching for a Solutions Consultant to join our team!

Understanding their business landscape and objectives and demonstrating and articulating the value of the Adobe Experience Cloud solutions and how they optimise and support their digital strategies and tackle their most important business challenges. Native fluency in Spanish, proficient in English

Experience in a technical pre-sales, consulting, specific industry or digital marketing environment
Experience of Adobe Analytics, Adobe Target, Adobe Audience Manager would be a benefit.

Title: Data Engineer (Remote) (12000 USD/Mes)
Location: Gran Santiago, Región Metropolitana de Santiago, Chile
Company_size: De 11 a 50 empleados · Tecnología, información e internet
Apts: ['Almacenamiento de datos', 'Análisis de datos', 'Apache Kafka', 'Arquitectura de sistemas', 'Container Orchestration', 'Extraer, transformar y cargar (ETL)', 'Hive', 'Ingeniería de datos', 'Microsoft Power BI', 'Visualización de datos']
Description:
About The Position

WHAT WE DO Imagine if every time you went to the doctor you paid cash upfront before you are treated, where every time you rented an apartment you paid 2 years cash upfront, or where your monthly paycheck is frequently delayed for months at a time. Then imagine doing that without a loan, credit card, or even bank accounts. This is everyday life for over 3 billion people in developing countries around the world. We are Migo, and we are on a mission to change this by re-inventing the way people access and use credit. Through a simple API integration to our platform, companies can enable their customers to make purchases and pay bills on credit, or get personal loans. Leveraging proprietary datasets, Migo builds ML algorithms on customer phone records, bank records, and payment transactions to assess credit risk, enabling us to offer credit lines to individuals and small businesses. This credit line can be used to make purchases from a merchant or withdraw cash without the need for point-of-sale hardware or plastic cards. Because of our proprietary data and innovative technical solutions, Migo is able to provide credit to underbanked customers who are not typically covered by credit bureaus, a critical area of growth for developing countries. RESPONSIBILITIES OF THE ROLE Are you a data engineer ready to help us redefine credit for the 21st century? We are on a mission to leverage data from partners around the globe to perform credit scoring for 3 billion people. The opportunities for you to make an impact are limitless. As an experienced data engineer, we would look to you to design a high-capacity data pipeline architecture as well as design data governance policies while ensuring privacy and security of sensitive data. You will develop scalable data management systems and manage the storage of large datasets. You will be involved with creating performant and reliable ETL jobs, as well as manage external data feeds across on-premise and cloud infrastructure. WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR As a data pipeline engineer, you will develop scalable data management systems and manage the storage of large datasets. We would be looking to you to create performant and reliable ETL jobs, as well as manage external data feeds across on-premise and cloud infrastructure. You are also a clear and concise communicator and can communicate ideas to a wide range of stakeholders, both technical and non-technical. You appreciate hearing different points of view and wait to hear other's point of view before offering your own. You have a pragmatic approach to building systems, see multiple ways of solving problems, and can discuss the tradeoffs of each solution. You are technology agnostic with a broad depth of experience using many different technologies. You have traveled extensively or have lived in a developing country. You are empathetic, self-aware, and respect all cultures. You are fun and enlightening to work with, and you have a good work/life balance with hobbies and interests you are happy to share with others. In the first 90 days you will: - Rewrite our big data ETL pipeline to create datasets for our modeling efforts - Wrangle with raw data from large, diverse data sets from our distribution partners - Automate data integrity checks - Connect our various databases to our BI platform OUR TECH STACK Our technology stack consists of modern tools; we are open to technologies and pick the right tool for the job: - Python for Machine Learning e.g. (Scikit-learn and PyTorch) - Python/Scala for data pipelines - Scala/Java/Python for micro-services and APIs - Swagger(OpenAPI) for API documentation - Docker and Kubernetes to package and run services - AWS for underlying infrastructure - On-premise servers for data processing and extraction at our partners Requirements - Degree in a relevant technical field or equivalent experience - 5+ years of experience building production-quality software infrastructure - Experience developing ETL jobs - Fluency in SQL and experience with RDBMSs - Fluency in Python data tools e.g. Pandas, Dask, or Pyspark - Experience designing and building big data pipelines - Experience working on large scale, distributed systems Desirable - Experience working with AWS, GCP, or other cloud-based services - Experience at a rapidly growing startup or with cutting-edge teams at a larger tech company

Requirements

None

Benefits

Vacaciones / Flexibilidad de Trabajo
Trabajo Remoto: Globalmente remoto
