Title: Data Steward
Location: Chile
Company_size: Más de 10.001 empleados · Investigación biotecnológica
Apts: ['Calidad de datos', 'Customer-Focused Selling', 'Estrategia de datos', 'Estrategias de red', 'Gestión de datos', 'Gobierno de datos', 'Información de clientes', 'Jupyter', 'Procesos de negocio', 'Quality Reporting']
Description:
The Position

Our Vision

Our vision is to make CX as transformative as our science and be known for consistently creating seamless customer experiences that are as innovative and impactful as our medicines.

This is why we are evolving the LATAM Omnichannel team - to make this a reality by integrating digital and face-to-face interactions seamlessly and allowing us to rapidly identify priorities to engage our customers and establish leadership in the prioritized therapeutic areas.

The Position

As the Data Steward, you play a key role in LATAM’s omnichannel customer engagement transformation to drive customer centricity and create seamless customer experiences. You will be accountable for the quality of the customer data in the organization, ensuring the right adoption (and creation if needed) of business processes and that the Affiliate follows a consistent process for managing, storing and using data while taking into consideration local

requirements and regulations. You create a data-driven culture within your Affiliate and you promote a common understanding of the importance of having standardized data management processes in place and high quality data in order to ensure robust analysis and meaningful insights generation.

You report directly to the Omnichannel Strategist in the Affiliate and work closely with the Data Governance and Analytics Lead to tailor the Network strategy and guidance to local standards and requirements for data management and data governance.

You work closely with the Analytics & Insights Partner to monitor data quality performance KPIs and suggest areas for improvement at Affiliate and Network level. You are the local subject matter expert for master data and customer experience transactional data domains.

You are accountable for the local availability of customer data and the functionality of the tools, and inform the IT Business Partner of any data, systems and technical needs required to leverage the data.


Key Responsibilities

Execute local actions and data governance activities according to the Data Governance and Analytics Strategy and corporate policies, being responsible for quality of data and metadata (completeness, format and consistency of data), consistent local processes for data collection and maintenance to ensure availability, integrity, usability and security of data usage in the Affiliate
Partner closely with Global Programs (EpiCX, RDI, Aspire) and Products (e.g

Customer360, Personify), and the LATAM Business Technology team to align on the technology deployment roadmap. Flag any technical needs to ensure readiness and successful implementation on the data side in your Affiliate

Act as the local data expert of customer engagement programs and related

technological requirements (e.g. EpiCX), ensuring data availability and access control, master data management and life-cycle records and data change request oversight, guiding MDM, OM, Gigya, OCE-O & OCE-P/D configurations, leveraging tools and systems and supporting and testing of new releases (e.g for the EpiCx Integrated product this includes MDM, OM and OCE-P/D), participating as trainers, reporting and managing improvements to the Global OCE-P team

Leverage OCE-P/D to provide insight into utilization of fields and upstream data sources for business users and enable broader initiatives (e.g., segmentation, profiling)
Ensure data quality by maintaining (and update as required) organizational structures, hierarchies, territory alignments, product and customer alignments in OM system, in response to personnel or strategy changes periodically and/or as required
Maintain a constant data management process for data quality on Reltio, identifying duplicates and potential matches, following the flow of each source, ensuring Reltio is the only source of truth for customer registration, and approving DCRs originating from OCE and Gigya (digital portals)
Partner with the Analytics & Insights Partner to support specific digital data and local insights generation projects ensuring availability of high quality, clean and standardized*data and define, monitor and report data quality KPIs to track evolution and recommend on improvements

About The Job

The Google Cloud Platform team helps customers transform and build what's next for their business — all with technology built in the cloud. Our products are engineered for security, reliability and scalability, running the full stack from infrastructure to applications to devices and hardware. Our teams are dedicated to helping our customers — developers, small and large businesses, educational institutions and government agencies — see the benefits of our technology come to life. As part of an entrepreneurial team in this rapidly growing business, you will play a key role in understanding the needs of our customers and help shape the future of businesses of all sizes use technology to connect with customers, employees and partners.

As a Customer Engineer, you will work directly with Technical Sales teams as a machine learning subject matter expert to differentiate Google Cloud to our customers.

In this role, you will help prospective customers and partners understand the power of Google Cloud, explaining technical features, helping customers design architectures, and problem-solving any potential roadblocks. Additionally, you will have the opportunity to help customers to leverage specialized Machine Learning (ML) hardware developed by Google (e.g., Tensor Processing Unit (TPU)). You will work closely with customers and product development to shape the TPU platform.

Google Cloud accelerates organizations’ ability to digitally transform their business with the best infrastructure, platform, industry solutions and expertise. We deliver enterprise-grade solutions that leverage Google’s cutting-edge technology – all on the cleanest cloud in the industry. Customers in more than 200 countries and territories turn to Google Cloud as their trusted partner to enable growth and solve their most critical business problems.

Responsibilities

Work with the team to identify and qualify business opportunities, understand key customer technical objections, and develop the strategy to resolve technical blockers.
Provide machine learning expertise to support the technical relationship with Google’s customers, including product and solution briefings and proof-of-concept work.
Partner directly with product management to prioritize solutions impacting customer adoption to Google Cloud.
Recommend integration strategies, enterprise architectures, platforms, and application infrastructure required to successfully implement a complete solution using best practices on Google Cloud.
Travel to customer sites, conferences, and other related events as required.

Description:
We are looking for contributors in Chile to read and record short sentences through our Appen Mobile app.



In this project, Appen is collecting English speech data to train and develop artificial intelligence algorithms that will be used to improve speech recognition technologies.



Task: The task contains a total of 435 short sentences that you will have to read from the screen and record through the Appen Mobile app. You will have to follow the sentences written in English. There is no need to create your own sentences. An example of a sentence that you will have to read: “Okay Alexa, I need directions to get to work.”



Duration: Each sentence will take an average of 3 to 6 seconds. Plan 2 hours to record the 435 sentences. Of course, we recommend that you stop from time to time to rest. We will give you at least 7 days to record your session.



Payment: Payment will be made once you submit ALL 435 verified recordings. If any of your 435 audio recordings are not accepted, we will pay you pro rata with an acceptance rate of at least 80%.




Requirements:



Have a recent smartphone
if you have an iPhone, it has to be 8 or newer
if you have an Android mobile, it has to be from 2017 or newer
Be a native English speaker living in Chile
Know how to record in a very quiet environment, free from any background noise.



Thank you and we hope to work with you soon!



"Appen has a diverse, inclusive culture that is vital to our mission of helping build better AI. We offer opportunities for individuals of all abilities and backgrounds."

Description:
About The Position

Who we are:

We’re the most successful startup you’ve never heard of. We’ve saved 3 million

Americans over a billion dollars on their medications since we were founded in 2017. We’re focused on making medications more affordable and convenient to purchase and we’re giving consumers and their families the power to make better choices and lead healthier lives. We are a product-forward company that knows how to execute quickly, build things right, and be good to each other while we do it.

And we’re small. No smaller than that. Eight engineers including management (hint you manage yourself).

We don’t hire often and when we do it’s normally through referrals. So if you’re reading this, chances are you got it from someone who works here… ask them what it’s like!

What we’re looking for:

We’re looking for an experienced Data Scientist to join our remote team. You need to be a strong problem solver who can act with very little oversight and deliver high-quality solutions.

We work in a very challenging business domain, the US HealthCare space. An important part of the role will be learning this domain and then applying that knowledge to solve complex problems. The scope of this role is very broad and you will be expected to have an opinion on the approach to pricing and data analytics for the entire company.

Responsibilities:

The main responsibilities include (but are definitely not limited to):
Strategize, test and implement Hippo’s pricing algorithms across multiple partners and pricing sources;
Customer retention analysis and strategies to improve customer loyalty and LTV;
Work hand-in-hand with Hippo’s data Engineers to implement strategic solutions and load new pricing, drug information etc.;
Claim analysis and invoicing;
Adhoc analysis based on business requirements with both SQL and Python;
Keep our data safe. We are very serious about our customers' personal medical information

Requirements:
5+ years of data analysis and/or working with Data Solutions
Strong Python / Pandas and SQL skills
Good product thinking and ability to work independently towards goals
Know the difference between simple and easy
Excellent communication skills
Healthcare experience is a big plus

Requirements

None

Vacaciones / Flexibilidad de Trabajo

Description:
Our Company

Changing the world through digital experiences is what Adobe’s all about. We give everyone—from emerging artists to global brands—everything they need to design and deliver exceptional digital experiences! We’re passionate about empowering people to create beautiful and powerful images, videos, and apps, and transform how companies interact with customers across every screen.

We’re on a mission to hire the very best and are committed to creating exceptional employee experiences where everyone is respected and has access to equal opportunity. We realize that new ideas can come from everywhere in the organization, and we know the next big idea could be yours!

The opportunity

We’re searching for a Solutions Consultant to join our team!

What you'll do

As a Solution Consultant, you’ll act as a trusted advisor to our customers - the world's most innovative companies! Understanding their business landscape and objectives and demonstrating and articulating the value of the Adobe Experience Cloud solutions and how they optimise and support their digital strategies and tackle their most important business challenges. You'll provide our customers with advice on digital change, helping them to utilise Adobe Analytics, Customer Journey Analytics, Real-Time CDP and Adobe Target to strengthen their brand and grow their business.

As a core member of the team, you’ll collaborate with and support our sales and customer success organisations.

The ideal candidate will have a blended technical and digital marketing background with a good eye for presentation and compelling demonstrations. You’ll have the confidence to discuss our solutions and technology with both marketing and IT customer at all levels.

What you need to succeed

You’ll need the following skills to be successful:

A strong understanding of marketing or ad technology and how this can drive digital transformation e.g. analytics, personalization, CDP, DSP
A strong understanding of digital marketing and emerging trends
Ability to identify the critical business issues that customers are facing and provide solution approaches
Exceptional presentation skills, conversational skills and experience as a trusted advisor
Expert in building and presenting use cases and value propositions
Strong demonstration and value-selling experience
Crafting end-to-end user experiences, using innovative ways to combining content, web journey, personalised experiences and marketing automation
Self-motivated with a strong aim to succeed in a highly dynamic environment
Ability to multi-task in a fast-paced environment
Maintain an understanding of competitors, especially strengths and weaknesses of competitor solutions
Develop & maintain authoritative understanding of digital technologies and marketing trends
Provide creative and strategic content/input as part of the RFP or proposal process, presentations and client case studies
Participate in customer workshops, presentations, and other working sessions as required
Native fluency in Spanish, proficient in English

The following requirements are relevant to this role:

Experience in a technical pre-sales, consulting, specific industry or digital marketing environment
Experience of Adobe Analytics, Adobe Target, Adobe Audience Manager would be a benefit.

Our Vision

Our vision is to make CX as transformative as our science and be known for consistently creating seamless customer experiences that are as innovative and impactful as our medicines. This is why we are evolving the LATAM Omnichannel team - to make this a reality by integrating digital and face-to-face interactions seamlessly and allowing us to rapidly identify priorities to engage our customers and establish leadership in the prioritized therapeutic areas.

The Position

As the Analytics and Insights Partner you play a key role in LATAM’s omnichannel customer engagement transformation to drive customer centricity and create seamless customer experiences.

You are responsible to actively collect, analyze and generate insights in a consistent and homogeneous way to support the Network and local teams in their activities to gather customer feedback, segment customers based on their preferences and measure campaign and channel performance, with the overall aim to create personalized customer experiences. You will be working closely with the Global Ecosystem Insights and Advance Analytics teams and Global data management and analytics programs (e.g. EpiCX, RDI) to drive a data-driven culture and insights driven next best actions as it relates to personalized customer engagements.

As part of the LATAM Network Team you will be reporting to the Data Governance & Analytics Lead and directly work with the Network and Affiliate teams to provide on-demand support in their various data analytics and insights generation activities. This can include the creation, maintenance and optimization of dashboards to measure performance of campaigns, channels and content across customer segments, establishing digital customer feedback loops in accordance with the continuous learning and closed-loop feedback strategy and finally creating valuable customer insights. You will be supporting the Business and Customer Success Lead in conducting business reviews by analyzing the KPIs related to the defined outcomes. Based on this, you will also make recommendations for improvements to ensure customer and business success.

You will also be working with the Omnichannel Outcomes Leads to create the measurement plans for the TA omnichannel strategies.


Key Responsibilities

You are responsible for the effective translation of data into valuable insights across all digital (e.g. HCP Portal, emailing, remote engagement, social media) and non-digital touchpoints within the omnichannel TA strategies and their effective communication to various stakeholder groups
Define criteria to prioritize analytics and insights generation demand across LATAM and Affiliates with Network and local stakeholders
Support the Business and Customer Excellence Lead in conducting Regional and Affiliate business reviews by sharing key performance indicators aligned to the defined outcomes, and recommend areas for improvement and action plans where appropriate
Collaborate with Channel Specialists to determine the value and effectiveness of all types of channels, translating incoming data into business results and generated impact
Collaborate with Content Partners to monitor and measure campaign and content performance to showcase their effectiveness and results of marketing campaigns
Partner with the Customer Insights Lead to operationalize customer segmentation into the data collection process and generate meaningful insights for each segment
Ensure alignment and standardization of the data and insights quality according to the Data Governance and Analytics Strategy and coordinate with Data Stewards in the Affiliates to define any actions needed to improve data quality standards
Lead / participate in regional digital analytics projects (e.g. HCP Portal analysis) and liaise with Data Governance & Analytics Lead to raise any business or technical needs (e.g. new data sources)
Within LATAM Network and Affiliate teams and with Global Programs, act as the translator between data experts and the business, facilitating cross functional collaboration
Leverage the Network to capture learnings and create synergies between Affiliates in data gathering and insights generation processes, and share them with Data Governance & Analytics Lead in order to iterate in the Data Governance and Analytics Strategy
Manage and comply with any regulatory requirements related to the above activities
Actively eliminate low value activities, and continuously reevaluate the prioritization and focus of the teams to drive the business forward on highest priorities, while creating synergies and eliminating duplication
Ensure that research is conducted with the highest degree of integrity, in compliance with appropriate policies and SOPs, and that learnings are shared broadly and archived effectively for future reference

What's in it for you?

This is a key role to enable Roche’s new omnichannel customer engagement vision which will provide you will opportunities to work with Senior LATAM stakeholders
You will have the opportunity to work in a Network role and support Affiliates in gaining valuable insights of their customers through the application of data analytics and visualizations helping them to optimize their omnichannel engagement strategies

Role Interfaces

As the Analytics & Insights Partner, you will interact with the following:

Digital Customer Engagement & Insights - LATAM

○ Business and Customer Excellence Lead

○ Customer Insights Lead

○ Data Governance & Analytics Lead

○ CX Specialist

○ Channel Specialist

○ Content Partner

Global

○ Global Ecosystem Insights

○ Global Programs (e.g. EpiCX, RDI, Aspire)

Other LATAM roles & functions

○ Patient Journey Partners (PJPs) & HSPs (Health System Partners)


Experience & Qualifications

Education

Bachelor's degree (scientific, digital, economic or business degree). An advanced degree in Life sciences and/ or MBA is a plus


Professional Experience

5+ years experience in Analytics Translation (i.e translate analytics into insights), Performance Analytics and proven skills working with Data & Analytics platforms, Tableau and Digital Landscape, Channel & Touchpoint Analytics (web, search, social, email, chat, virtual meetings / conferences etc.) and Campaign Analytics
Excellent analytical and problem solving skills with the ability to translate complex data sets into valuable insights for various stakeholder groups through dashboards and visualization tools
Experience with digital, omnichannel, and associated data/analytics capabilities in large biopharma environments is highly desirable
Experience in understanding customer experiences in a healthcare system set-up and acting on them, improving HCP and patient satisfaction is highly desirable
Ability to understand and translate marketing analytics reports, experience in VVPM (Veeva Vault PromoMats) Content Sharing (DAM) and Approval (MLR) process
Experience in Jupyter notebook, Amazon Athena and Google Analytics is a plus
Excellent project and stakeholder management, interpersonal and organizational skills, as well as the ability to handle multiple projects, demand, priorities and stakeholders simultaneously

Languages

Fluent in English and Spanish (oral & written) is essential


Skills & Competencies

Competencies

Visionary: You have the vision to enhance customer engagement through a data-driven culture, using creative strategic approaches to generate valuable customer insights and enable the team to act on them
Architect: You contribute to a team culture where you motivate others to leverage data and take bold decisions to accelerate a personalized and omnichannel customer engagement
Catalyst: You have an entrepreneurial spirit, providing solutions and removing roadblocks to act quickly upon evolving omnichannel business and customer needs
Coach: You motivate and help Affiliate teams to build the skills and mindsets needed to build a data-driven culture

In addition, the following skills will make you successful in your position and career development at Roche:

Digital Literacy
Risk Taking & Experimentation
Outcomes Based Planning
Systems Thinking
Customer Centricity
Insights Generation
Performance Analytics
Data Science
Analytics Automation
Data Management

At Roche, more than 100,000 people across 100 countries are pushing back the frontiers of healthcare. Working together, we’ve become one of the world’s leading research-focused healthcare groups. Our success is built on innovation, curiosity and diversity.

Title: Data Collection-Coihueco, Ñuble Region

Company_size: De 501 a 1.000 empleados · Servicios de TI y consultoría de TI
Apts: ['Recogida de datos', 'Todos los filtros']
Description:
We are looking for contributors in Chile to read and record short sentences through our Appen Mobile app.



In this project, Appen is collecting English speech data to train and develop artificial intelligence algorithms that will be used to improve speech recognition technologies.



Task: The task contains a total of 435 short sentences that you will have to read from the screen and record through the Appen Mobile app. You will have to follow the sentences written in English. There is no need to create your own sentences. An example of a sentence that you will have to read: “Okay Alexa, I need directions to get to work.”



Duration: Each sentence will take an average of 3 to 6 seconds. Plan 2 hours to record the 435 sentences. Of course, we recommend that you stop from time to time to rest. We will give you at least 7 days to record your session.



Payment: Payment will be made once you submit ALL 435 verified recordings. If any of your 435 audio recordings are not accepted, we will pay you pro rata with an acceptance rate of at least 80%.




Requirements:



Have a recent smartphone
if you have an iPhone, it has to be 8 or newer
if you have an Android mobile, it has to be from 2017 or newer
Be a native English speaker living in Chile
Know how to record in a very quiet environment, free from any background noise.



Thank you and we hope to work with you soon!



"Appen has a diverse, inclusive culture that is vital to our mission of helping build better AI. We offer opportunities for individuals of all abilities and backgrounds."
